title: fortunella polyandra
intro: Fortunella polyandra, also known as the Chinese box orange, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, closely related to the orange and lemon. The medicinal properties of Fortunella polyandra include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and inflammation due to its high content of flavonoids and limonoids. The plant is rich in vitamins A and C, and has been used to prevent scurvy, improve immune function, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Fortunella polyandra can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections.
